expected_issues.description: The prop is named selectionType but FileUpload is not selecting anything — it is uploading. The term was borrowed from ActionList where it fits. It should be uploadType.

onCancel implies the upload is still in progress, but the close/dismiss icon also appears in error states where the upload has already failed. The correct name is onDismiss, consistent with other Blade overlay and dismissible item patterns.
onDelete implies destruction of data, but the action is removing a file from the upload list. Blade uses onRemove for list-item removal actions (e.g. Tag). It should be onRemove.
Types named File and FileList collide with the browser's built-in Web API globals of the same name. They must be prefixed — BladeFile and BladeFileList — to avoid TypeScript ambiguity.
